data.description: Money markets price in 80% chance of one ECB rate cut in March 2026 from 65% before US data.

data.title: "Surreal game 'Tingus Goose' coming to Steam by Playsaurus and Ultraplayers, with renowned artist MasterTingus. Release date: Aug 1, 2025."
data.description: Sweaty Chair Studio, an indie developer, has announced the upcoming release of a fully enhanced 1.0 PC edition of a popular mobile game. The game will be co-published by Playsaurus and Ultraplayers, with art direction by the renowned surrealist MasterTingus. The announcement was made in Sydney and Los Angeles on August 1, 2025. This highly anticipated release promises to bring the cult mobile phenomenon to a wider audience of gamers, with enhanced graphics and gameplay features.

data.title: Skeens Warehouse Services partners with Facilio to streamline work order management & unify vendor communications.
data.description: A company based in New York known as Skeens Warehouse Services, which has more than 35 years of experience in providing third-party facility support, has formed a partnership with Facilio, a worldwide property operations platform. This collaboration aims to enhance work order management efficiency and consolidate vendor communications, leading to improved operations in their facilities.

data.title: SERES climbs 235 spots to rank 169 in Fortune China 500 list, driven by AITO brand growth.
data.description: Chongqing, China - In a remarkable achievement, SERES has been recognized as the fastest-rising company on the Fortune China 500 list for 2025. The company has surged to the 169th position, moving up an impressive 235 spots from its previous ranking. This significant jump highlights SERES' exceptional performance in China's competitive New Energy Vehicle (NEV) market. The company's ascent showcases its robust growth and success amidst stiff competition, solidifying its position as a major player in the industry.

data.title: California Patriot-led rally planned for Aug 3, 2025 at State Capitol to address leadership crisis.
data.description: On August 3rd, 2025, at 1:00 PM, a coalition comprising California political figures, activists, and citizens will convene at the west steps of the California State Capitol in Sacramento. The rally aims to discuss crucial governance matters.

data.title: Performant Healthcare, Inc. expects to report second quarter revenues of approximately $37 million - preliminary financial results.
data.description: Performant Healthcare, Inc., a top provider of technology-driven payment integrity and related analytics services, disclosed its initial financial performance for Q2 2025. The company, listed on Nasdaq as PHLT, forecasted second quarter revenues around $37 million. It plans to submit its Form 10-Q for the quarter closing on June 30, 2025, by August 7, 2025.

data.title: Performant Healthcare, Inc. will be acquired by Machinify for approximately $670 million, a leading payment integrity services provider.
data.description: A healthcare company based in Plantation, Florida, known as Performant Healthcare, Inc., recently disclosed its plans of being bought out by Machinify, a prominent healthcare intelligence firm and a part of New Mountain Capital portfolio. This acquisition deal, valued at around $670 million, signifies Machinify's intent to acquire Performant and further expand its technological capabilities in payment integrity, eligibility, and analytics services. This agreement solidifies Performant's strategic direction and offers potential growth opportunities for both entities in the healthcare sector.

data.title: Alliance Entertainment promotes 7 executives to SVP roles across key functions to fuel capital-efficient expansion.
data.description: Promotions are being implemented across various departments including sales, fulfillment, IT, finance, and legal functions. These functions are crucial for driving the cost-effective expansion in licensed collectibles and physical media. This strategic initiative aims to enhance growth and leverage opportunities in these sectors where Capital-efficient expansion will be emphasized.

data.title: FitLife Brands (Nasdaq: FTLF) to report Q2 earnings on Aug 14, 2025, as a provider of nutritional supplements.
data.description: FitLife Brands, Inc., a leading provider of nutritional supplements and wellness products, is set to disclose its financial results for the second quarter of fiscal 2025 on Thursday, August 14, 2025. The announcement was made by the company based in Omaha, NE, listed on Nasdaq as FTLF. This report will offer insights into the company's performance during this period.

data.title: A&W Restaurants celebrates National Root Beer Float Day with free floats, limited-edition mugs, and support for veterans.
data.description: A popular restaurant chain famous for its signature Root Beer and classic American menu is honoring National Root Beer Float Day in Lexington, Kentucky on August 1, 2025. A&W® Restaurants, the oldest franchised eatery in the US, is celebrating the occasion by raising funds for DAV. This iconic brand is renowned for its flavorful Root Beer and traditional dishes, and is excited to contribute to a great cause in conjunction with the festivities.

data.title: Evolve Health grows in Q2 2025, adds physicians and clinics in Florida & Texas, enhancing podiatry services.
data.description: In Winter Garden, Florida, on August 1, 2025, Evolve Health, a prominent podiatry group, revealed a significant growth initiative spanning Florida and Texas in the second quarter of 2025. This expansion encompasses the recruitment of additional physicians and the establishment of new clinical locations.
